creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
shaun       2006-12-05 17:15:11 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    games                Makefile 
  Added files:
    games/jaggedalliance2 Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-message 
                          pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This is a source port of Jagged Alliance 2, in which the player controls
  mercenaries to liberate the small country of Arulco.
  
  You need an original game CD and installation to use this port.
  
  PR:             ports/105598
  Submitted by:   Christoph Mallon <christoph.mallon@gmx.de>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1059    +1 -0      ports/games/Makefile
  1.1       +81 -0     ports/games/jaggedalliance2/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/games/jaggedalliance2/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/games/jaggedalliance2/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/games/jaggedalliance2/pkg-message (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/games/jaggedalliance2/pkg-plist (new)
